mapper.select: SELECT A.DOG_NUMBER, A.DOG_NAME, A.DOG_BREED, US.SHELTER_NAME, A.DOG_SAFE_DATE, AI.ARCHIVE_IMG_PATH FROM DDD_ARCHIVE A LEFT JOIN DDD_USER_SHELTER US ON A.USER_NUMBER = US.USER_NUMBER LEFT JOIN ( SELECT DOG_NUMBER, MIN(ARCHIVE_IMG_NUMBER) AS MIN_IMG_NUMBER FROM DDD_ARCHIVE_IMG GROUP BY DOG_NUMBER ) FIRST_IMG ON A.DOG_NUMBER = FIRST_IMG.DOG_NUMBER LEFT JOIN DDD_ARCHIVE_IMG AI ON FIRST_IMG.MIN_IMG_NUMBER = AI.ARCHIVE_IMG_NUMBER WHERE A.USER_NUMBER = #{userNumber} ORDER BY A.DOG_NUMBER DESC
